key_features: Cross-border seller integrations: Shopee, Ozon, TikTok Shop, 1688 Kuajingmaihuo

onebound_1688_ranking.response_format: JSON with items.item[] containing title, pic_url, sales (30-day), num_iid, sort, goods_Score, detail_url
onebound_1688_ranking.real_response_test: 200 OK, 1.9s, 0.593s execution, returns proper error 4016 with fake key
onebound_1688_ranking.registration: open.onebound.cn/console/ - 1688 cross-border & Taobao overseas free policy

open_1688_com_cross_border.solution: 跨境综合解决方案（自用） Cross-border Comprehensive Solution (Self-use)
open_1688_com_cross_border.requirements: Need 1688 account (Chinese phone) to register as ISV at open.1688.com

pricing_found.Onebound: Free policy on registration, pay per call after free tier

key_discovery: The user's idea (1688 best sellers accessible like Amazon/ML) is PARTIALLY RIGHT - the URLs exist publicly (kj.1688.com/best_seller.html) but require LOGIN. However, the 1688 OFFICIAL RANKING API (via Onebound or open.1688.com) gives us this data programmatically, no login required.
concrete_recommendation: Sign up for Onebound free tier to get a real API key. Test 1688.item_search_best with hot products. If quality is good, this replaces our entire trending/crawler approach.
